title: Pure Energizing Vietnamese Celery Noodles
description: A sweet and shaggy Vietnamese dish featuring celery, spherified pearls of tapioca, and ayurvedic-tamasic friendly ingredients to provide a boost of energy.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the tapioca pearls according to package instructions.
In a blender, combine coconut milk, brown sugar, grated ginger, lemon juice, and salt, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine chopped celery, cooked tapioca pearls, and the coconut milk mixture, and toss to combine.
Stir in chopped basil and adjust seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the mixture a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the noodles chilled, garnished with additional basil if desired.
Spherify the tapioca pearls by dropping them into a bath of cold water and letting them sit for a few minutes.
Strain the spherified pearls and add them to the noodles.
Toss the noodles gently to combine with the spherified pearls.
